allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add About & What We Do pages, navbar v2, remove gradient overlays, update design system

- Add AboutPage \(/about/our-story\) with dark hero, canvas particles, drag-scroll
  timeline, image reveal, values, globe, stats, certifications, and CTA sections
- Add WhatWeDoPage \(/what-we-do\) with white hero, 5-tab integration model,
  drag-scroll gallery, project cards, capability matrix, and certifications strip
- Add HeroParticles shared 2D canvas component \(green attract / blue repel modes\)
- Rebuild Navbar v2: hover-intent mega menu, About dropdown with icons, backdrop
  overlay, mobile accordion, text wordmark, z-index 1000, 900px mobile breakpoint
- Remove all gradient fade overlays \(hero-fade, bridge, photo-break-fade,
  evidence-strip-overlay, gallery-slide-overlay, case-study-overlay, trust-overlay,
  trust-fade, gallery-card-overlay\) across all pages
- Reorder nav: About first, then What We Do
- Update design system: fix z-index scale \(1000+\), fix navbar breakpoint \(900px\),
  remove deleted effect refs, add new animations/components/page patterns sections
- Add self-hosted fonts \(Fraunces, Sora, JetBrains Mono\) and land-50m.json for globe

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(cd "F:/Cursor/jasmino website/jasmino" && npm run dev 2>&1 | head -20)
